creator: opensource2005@yandex.ru
text:
After perfoming upgrade to Xorg 7.4, it halts my internal USB controller completely. I have this in /var/log/messages:

Mar  4 19:42:51 freebsd kernel: usb3: unrecoverable error, controller halted
Mar  4 19:42:51 freebsd kernel: usb3: blocking intrs 0x10

Part of my dmesg:

        The Regents of the University of California. All rights reserved.
FreeBSD is a registered trademark of The FreeBSD Foundation.

MOV,PAT,PSE36,CLFLUSH,DTS,ACPI,MMX,FXSR,SSE,SSE2,SS,HTT,TM,PBE>

/0.01, addr 2> on uhub3

Xorg has compiled without HAL and AIGLX options.

How-To-Repeat: start Xorg 7.4 on same hardware.
